sections.paragraph:
προσωπολημψία, ας, ἡ (edd. also -ληψία; s. προσωπολημπτέω) partiality named as a sin, w. other sins Pol 6:1. Not found in God (TestJob 43:13) Ro 2:11; Eph 6:9; Col 3:25. Pl. τὴν πίστιν ἔχειν ἐν προσωπολημψίαις hold the faith while showing partiality Js 2:1 (Goodsp, Probs. 142f).—EDNT. TW.

edd. edd. = editions, editors

Pol Pol = Polycarp to the Philippians—List 1

TestJob TestJob = Testament of Job—List 2

EDNT EDNT = Exegetical Dictionary of the NT—List 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 887
